image:image.image:title: Kedarkantha Trek Summit Sunrise — Uttarakhand Himalayas
image:image.image:caption: Trekkers at Kedarkantha summit (3,810m) at golden hour in winter, Uttarkashi, Uttarakhand

image:image.image:title: Juda Ka Talab Frozen Lake — Kedarkantha Trek
image:image.image:caption: Juda Ka Talab frozen lake (2,950m) on the Kedarkantha Trek trail in December
image:image.image:geo_location: Juda Ka Talab, Uttarkashi, Uttarakhand, India

image:image.image:title: Kedarkantha Base Camp at 3,430m — Himalayan Camping
image:image.image:caption: Base camp at 3,430m above cloud level with Bandarpunch range views

image:image.image:title: Tungnath Temple in Snow — World's Highest Shiva Temple
image:image.image:caption: Tungnath Temple (3,680m), world's highest Shiva temple, covered in snow, Rudraprayag, Uttarakhand

image:image.image:title: Chandrashila Summit 360° Panorama — Uttarakhand
image:image.image:caption: 360° panoramic view from Chandrashila summit (4,090m) showing Kedarnath, Trishul, Nanda Devi peaks

image:image.image:title: Har Ki Dun Valley — Valley of Gods, Uttarakhand
image:image.image:caption: Har Ki Dun valley (3,566m) — Valley of Gods with ancient Govind Wildlife Sanctuary, Uttarkashi
image:image.image:geo_location: Har Ki Dun Valley, Uttarkashi, Uttarakhand, India

image:image.image:title: Valley of Flowers in Full Bloom — UNESCO World Heritage Site
image:image.image:caption: Valley of Flowers National Park (3,658m) in full bloom July-August, Chamoli, Uttarakhand — UNESCO World Heritage Site
image:image.image:geo_location: Valley of Flowers, Chamoli, Uttarakhand, India

image:image.image:title: Roopkund Skeleton Lake — Mystery Lake at 5,029m
image:image.image:caption: Roopkund Lake (5,029m) — the legendary skeleton lake, Chamoli, Uttarakhand, India

image:image.image:title: Hampta Pass Crossing — Kullu to Lahaul, Himachal Pradesh
image:image.image:caption: Trekkers crossing Hampta Pass (4,270m) — dramatic transition from lush Kullu valley to barren Lahaul landscape
image:image.image:geo_location: Hampta Pass, Kullu, Himachal Pradesh, India

image:image.image:title: Chandratal Lake — Moon Lake at 4,250m, Lahaul
image:image.image:caption: Chandratal (Moon Lake) at 4,250m in Lahaul valley — optional extension on Hampta Pass trek

image:image.image:title: Sar Pass Summit View — Parvati Valley, Himachal Pradesh
image:image.image:caption: Sar Pass (4,270m) summit panorama overlooking Parvati Valley and Kheerganga forests, Kullu, HP
image:image.image:geo_location: Sar Pass, Kullu, Himachal Pradesh, India

image:image.image:title: Kheerganga Natural Hot Spring — Parvati Valley Trek
image:image.image:caption: Natural hot spring pool at Kheerganga (3,050m) in Parvati Valley, Kullu, Himachal Pradesh
image:image.image:geo_location: Kheerganga, Parvati Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India

image:image.image:title: Kedarnath Temple at Dawn — Sacred Jyotirlinga, Uttarakhand
image:image.image:caption: Kedarnath Temple (3,583m) at dawn with Kedarnath Peak behind — one of the 12 sacred Jyotirlingas, Rudraprayag, Uttarakhand

image:image.image:title: Badrinath Temple — Char Dham Yatra, Uttarakhand
image:image.image:caption: Badrinath Temple with Neelkanth peak backdrop, Chamoli, Uttarakhand — one of the four sacred Char Dham sites
